mapper.select: select * from question where status = 1 order by rand() limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into question(subject, type, title, option_a, option_b, option_c, option_d, correct_answer, analysis, difficulty, status, create_time, update_time) values (#{subject}, #{type}, #{title}, #{optionA}, #{optionB}, #{optionC}, #{optionD}, #{correctAnswer}, #{analysis}, #{difficulty}, #{status}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
